schedule_requests.purpose: Resolve the open follow-up item by finalizing the scoped workflow, environment/guardrails, and success criteria for the first tiny live autonomy pilot.

open_items.goal: Clarify and document the concrete scope and success criteria for the first tiny live autonomy pilot (one narrow workflow, one environment, and one measurable outcome).
required_closures: Define the single workflow to automate in the pilot (e.g., triaging one specific type of user request).
Specify the environment and guardrails for the pilot (who can trigger it, what data it can access, and explicit do-not-do boundaries).
Set 1–3 quantitative or clearly observable success criteria for the tiny pilot (e.g., completion rate, manual override rate, time saved).
